Platform: Instagram Story
Required canvas: 1080 x 1920 px
Required aspect ratio: 9:16 vertical
Top safe zone: keep essential content below the top 180 px.
Bottom safe zone: keep essential content above the bottom 240 px.
Logo: MetroBuild Expo wordmark near the top, below the top safe zone.
CTA/helper: near the bottom, above the bottom safe zone.
Text density: no more than 5 short text blocks; destination should be largest and at most 2 lines.
Directional cue: arrow or path should be visually dominant and easy to follow on mobile.
